narrative: US Nonfarm Payrolls and Fed Governor Miran’s call for rate cuts drive the session as markets brace for a normalization in jobs growth. DXY consolidates -0.09% while USD/JPY holds at 156.61; the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the primary anchor despite rising intervention chatter. NZD/CAD emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme (NZD +0.611%, CAD -1.076%, spread 1.687%) as RBNZ hike bias diverges from BoC hold. Gold higher +0.44%; equities +0.75%; VIX 17.1. Watch US NFP data at 12:30 UTC.
